description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image and a before_script that updates apt, installs sqlite3, libsqlite3-dev and nodejs, installs bundler without docs, and runs bundle install -j $(nproc) --path vendor, with a cache on vendor/ruby. Define a rubocop job that executes `bundle exec rubocop --cache false`. Define a rails job (default stage) that runs `rails db:migrate`, `rails db:seed` and `rails test`, uses the postgres:alpine service, sets DATABASE_URL, POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_PASSSWORD, POSTGRES_USER and RAILS_ENV variables, and stores the coverage/ directory as an artifact. Define a pages job in the deploy stage that moves the coverage/ directory to public/ with `mv coverage/ public/` and publishes the public/ folder as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after 30 days. All jobs run on every branch with no additional rules.
